blocks.text: noted it. Nadia hadn't moved from her position since they came downstairs. The same stillness from the bonfire. The same controlled surface.
had watched Cade break. The kind of break that comes before the composure catches up.
had watched Wren stop moving. Just stopped, completely still, for three full seconds.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: Dean Ashby. We're all friends. We rented this house together for the weekend.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: Who else was in the house last night?

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: All of us. Cade Mercer. Nadia Reyes. Sophie Laurent. Wren Cole. And Marcus. Marcus Calloway.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: Julian Crane and Mara Voss. They're staying next door. They were here for dinner last night.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: Who was last to see Mr. Calloway alive?

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: I was. He said good night and went upstairs around nine.
Everyone went still. The argument. Nobody wanted to be the first to say it.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: There was â€” we heard voices. Upstairs. Around 9:15.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: An argument. It didn't last long.

blocks.prompt: The room goes quiet. Nobody wants to answer that. What does Julian do?

options.label: He says nothing. He's listening to who stays quiet longest.
He steps forward. "Inspector. I heard it too."
